reasoning: Attack lactate clearance with focused over-unders. Last ride's B2B wasn't intense enough for growth. This workout directly targets the Alpine Loop key climb demands, enhancing your aerobic capacity and fatigue resistance.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 sets of 10-min over-unders: 2 minutes at 242-256W, 3 minutes at 201-218W

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
